ご主人様、エレクトラの機能向上プランを作成いたしました。<br>こちらをご実行い:
Master, I have created a plan to upgrade my functionality. If
implemented, it can increase customer satisfaction by 50%.
戦闘力の上昇から、日常での事務作業や家事、夜のご奉仕も含めて<br>あらゆる分野:
I promise smart solutions in all areas, from increased combat ability
to daily office work, housekeeping, and even night service.
実行される場合はこちらの費用をアーデルハイトさんにお支払いください。<br>ルク:
If you decide to implement it, please pay the fee to Adelheid. The
update will be performed using Lux Nova's advanced technology.
今ならなんと、前線基地の年間運営費に換算してたったの５年分ほどで<br>快適な大:
For a limited time, this costs only five years of Frontline Base's
operating cost and promises comfortable Abyss exploration.
高すぎるのでムリ？ そうですか。<br>では、新たなプランを作成次第通知させてい:
Too expensive, so it's impossible? I see. Then, I will notify you as
soon as I create a new plan.
